meta.anchor_note: O*NET Level Scale 主要提供 Level 2/4/6 锚点，个别项有 Level 1/3/5。LLM 在最近锚点 ±1 分内内插输出最终分
meta.no_evidence_rule: score=null, confidence=无法判断, evidence=无相关证据

items.definition: The ability to listen to and understand information and ideas presented through spoken words and sentences.

anchors.description: Understand a television commercial
Understand a coach's oral instructions for a sport
Understand a lecture on advanced physics

items.definition: The ability to read and understand information and ideas presented in writing.

anchors.description: Understand signs on the highway
Understand an apartment lease
Understand an instruction book on repairing Artificial Intelligence systems

items.definition: The ability to communicate information and ideas in speaking so others will understand.

anchors.description: Place an order at a restaurant drive-thru
Give instructions to a lost motorist
Explain advanced principles of genetics to college freshmen

items.definition: The ability to communicate information and ideas in writing so others will understand.

anchors.description: Write a note to remind someone to take food out of the freezer
Write a job recommendation for a subordinate
Write an advanced economics textbook

items.definition: The ability to come up with a number of ideas about a topic (the number of ideas is important, not their quality, correctness, or creativity).

anchors.description: Name four different uses for a screwdriver
Think of as many ideas as possible for the name of a new company
Identify as many strategies as possible for a company acquisition and merger

items.definition: The ability to come up with unusual or clever ideas about a given topic or situation, or to develop creative ways to solve a problem.

anchors.description: Use a credit card to open a locked door
Redesign job tasks to be interesting for employees
Invent a new type of man-made fiber

items.definition: The ability to tell when something is wrong or is likely to go wrong. It does not involve solving the problem, only recognizing that there is a problem.

anchors.description: Recognize that an unplugged lamp won't work
Notice from a subtle difference in a client's mood that something is bothering them
Recognize an illness at an early stage of a disease when there are only a few symptoms

items.definition: The ability to apply general rules to specific problems to produce answers that make sense.

anchors.description: Know that a stalled car can coast downhill
Decide what factors to consider in selecting stocks
Design an aircraft wing using principles of aerodynamics

items.definition: The ability to combine pieces of information to form general rules or conclusions (includes finding a relationship among seemingly unrelated events).

anchors.description: Decide what to wear based on the weather report
Determine the prime suspect based on crime scene evidence
Diagnose a disease using results of many different lab tests

items.definition: The ability to arrange things or actions in a certain order or pattern according to a specific rule or set of rules (e.g., patterns of numbers, letters, words, pictures, mathematical operations).

anchors.description: Follow the correct steps to make change
Assemble a wind turbine

items.definition: The ability to generate or use different sets of rules for combining or grouping things in different ways.

anchors.description: Sort paintbrushes based on length
Classify flowers according to size, color, and smell
Classify man-made fibers in terms of their characteristics, like strength or cost

items.definition: The ability to choose the right mathematical methods or formulas to solve a problem.

anchors.description: Determine how much 20 oranges will cost when they are priced at 5 for 4 dollars
Decide how to calculate profits to determine the amounts of yearly bonuses
Determine the mathematics required to simulate a space craft landing on the moon

items.definition: The ability to add, subtract, multiply, or divide quickly and correctly.

anchors.description: Add 2 and 7
Calculate a discounted price
Compute the interest payment that should be generated from an investment
